text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a day off, I go to the racecourse to watch
some races for research...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You can do it! That's it! You're almost there!
Don't be scared!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Don't give up! Stay at it! The finish line is right in
front of you!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Huh... Oh, it's you!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Haha... Apologies for my unseemly behavior.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I just can't contain my excitement once they
round the fourth corner.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It's a moment when the stakes are so high that a
runner's entire demeanor changes. Do you know
what I mean?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I just can't resist that thrill!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That's... Ahem. Sorry, I'm doing it again. That's
enough.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says that, but she looks like she hasn't even
scratched the surface of this topic.
choice_data_list: Well, I have work to do, so...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure?! I know it's an important time for
you and your trainee, so you must be busy...
choice_data_list: It's okay. I have the day off.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Well, if you say so!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I know! Talking is nice and all, but a chat over
lunch would be even better, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Actually, there's a spot nearby that I've always
wanted to try out...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... It's such an honor to be able to chat with
you like this, just the two of us!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: So, about the race earlier...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! I know just what you mean! It's so
encouraging to see them chasing after their
dreams with all they have!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But it's the voices of all the fans cheering them on
that keeps driving them forward...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Thinking about it like that, races really do bring
people together, don't they?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: On that note, last year's races were also...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The Derby! The Derby is the best! Of course, the
G1 races are all amazing and deserve every bit of
respect they receive.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But I have a special attachment to the Japanese
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Actually, I watch it every year without fail!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: What?! How did it get so late already?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Unlike the students, we don't exactly have a
curfew, so...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Would you mind staying out a little longer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so we move to another shop, where we
continue to talk passionately about racing.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I... can't believe it's already morning...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Ummm... I'm sorry for keeping you out like this.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: But, well...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I had so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
In truth, from the time we first met, I could tell
you were also passionate about Umamusume and
racing...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It's great to be able to talk in depth about this
with someone! I had a wonderful time, hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: If it's okay with you, let's do this again sometime!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
...Ah, but we probably shouldn't stay up all night
next time!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I can feel the tiredness creeping up on me...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaawn...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We make our way back to the academy, stifling
our yawns as we go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It feels like my friendship with Tazuna has grown
stronger.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right, of course! It's an important time in your
trainee's career right now—you must be busy.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Um... Well, I'll be off, then. I'll see you around at
the academy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, Tazuna and I go our separate ways...
